data.name: LookupFilteredSubgrid_Display_Key
data.value: Lookup Filtered Subgrid 1.9.2

data.name: LookupFilteredSubgrid_Desc_Key
data.value: Displays related records filtered by a lookup field on the current Power Pages form, with full CRUD support. 1.9.2

data.name: Value_Display_Key
data.value: Bound Value

data.name: Value_Desc_Key
data.value: Placeholder bound text field used to host the control on the form.

data.name: TargetEntity_Display_Key
data.value: Subgrid Table Logical Name

data.name: TargetEntity_Desc_Key
data.value: Logical name of the related table to show in the subgrid (e.g. akatable).

data.name: TargetEntitySet_Display_Key
data.value: Subgrid Table Entity Set Name

data.name: TargetEntitySet_Desc_Key
data.value: OData / Web API plural entity set name used in /_api (e.g. akatables).

data.name: LookupField_Display_Key
data.value: Form Lookup Field Logical Name

data.name: LookupField_Desc_Key
data.value: Logical name of the lookup on the primary form used to filter the grid (e.g. fc_applican).

data.name: FilterAttribute_Display_Key
data.value: Subgrid Lookup Field Logical Name

data.name: FilterAttribute_Desc_Key
data.value: Logical name of the lookup column on the subgrid table that points to the form record/lookup (e.g. fc_contact).

data.name: DisplayColumns_Display_Key
data.value: Display Columns

data.name: DisplayColumns_Desc_Key
data.value: Multi-line comma-separated columns for the grid (optional braces). Example: {fc_contact, name, firstname, createdon}. Newlines allowed for long lists. Filter lookup expands to formatted display; other lookups use _attr_value.

data.name: PortalId_Display_Key
data.value: Portal / Website ID

data.name: PortalId_Desc_Key
data.value: Website GUID used in /_portal/modal-form-template-path/{portalId}. Empty GUID is allowed.

data.name: RecordId_Display_Key
data.value: Form Record ID

data.name: RecordId_Desc_Key
data.value: Record GUID for the modal form. Use 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 for Insert/create.

data.name: EntityFormId_Display_Key
data.value: Create Basic Form ID

data.name: EntityFormId_Desc_Key
data.value: GUID of the Insert Basic Form (entity form) opened in the create iframe modal.

data.name: EditEntityFormId_Display_Key
data.value: Edit Basic Form ID

data.name: EditEntityFormId_Desc_Key
data.value: GUID of the Edit Basic Form opened in the edit iframe modal. Record id comes from the grid row.

data.name: CreateButtonLabel_Display_Key
data.value: Create Button Label

data.name: CreateButtonLabel_Desc_Key
data.value: Text for the create button (e.g. Add Other Name). Defaults to Create if empty.

data.name: EditActionLabel_Display_Key
data.value: Edit Action Label

data.name: EditActionLabel_Desc_Key
data.value: Label for the row Edit action (e.g. Edit Other Name). Defaults to Edit if empty.

data.name: DeleteActionLabel_Display_Key
data.value: Delete Action Label

data.name: DeleteActionLabel_Desc_Key
data.value: Label for the row Delete action (e.g. Remove Other Names). Defaults to Remove Other Name if empty.

data.name: PageSize_Display_Key
data.value: Records Per Page

data.name: PageSize_Desc_Key
data.value: Number of records to load per page (1-100). Defaults to 10 if empty or invalid.
